name: Hand of Midas
description: Preserved through unknown magical means, the Hand of Midas is a weapon of greed, sacrificing animals to line the owner's pockets.

abilities.name: Transmute
abilities.description: Instantly kills the target non-hero unit, transmuting it into gold. Sets the target's gold bounty to a fixed value, while granting the target's default experience value without sharing it with others nearby. Number of Charges: 2. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: 600. Number of Random Allies: 1. Number of Random Allies (Turbo Mode): 2. If cast on a neutral creep, also grants a few Madstone to the caster, and one to random allies. A newly acquired Hand of Midas starts with 1 charge.
